arts.ttl: Everton vs Southampton – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Everton take on Southampton in the Premier League today in the final fixture at Goodison Park. The Toffees wave farewell to the famous ground this afternoon, before their move to a new stadium at Bramley-Moore Dock next season.
